findings.summary: 4-layer board reported as 0 copper layers; KiCad5 custom layer names not recognized
findings.details: The mppt-2420-hc is a 4-layer KiCad5 PCB (layers: Top/GND/3V3/Bottom). The analyzer reports copper_layers_used=0 and copper_layer_names=[] because it does not recognize KiCad5 custom layer names.

findings.summary: CAN bus correctly detected with TCAN334 transceiver linked to all four CAN nets
findings.details: The design_analysis.bus_analysis.can detector correctly identifies U7 (TCAN334) on all four CAN-related nets: CAN_H, CAN_L, CAN_RX, and CAN_TX.
